message:
perf(articles): drop `priority` on below-the-fold hero illustrations and re-compress the PNGs

Three changes, all aimed at the same goal — stop over-prioritizing
two below-the-fold decorative illustrations that were inflating LCP /
initial transfer on article pages:

1. `components/{slack-migration,wills-estate,overprompting}-article.tsx`:
   remove `priority` from the hero `<Image>` inside the article body.
   These illustrations live inside a large multi-section article and
   are not the LCP element — the LCP is the article headline card
   higher in the layout. Marking them `priority` was forcing an
   eager, high-priority fetch that contended with the real LCP
   candidate. `placeholder="blur"` is kept so there's still a graceful
   reveal when the image does load.

2. Re-compress the two corresponding illustration PNGs:
     app/writing/slack-mattermost-migration/og-illustration.png
         661,520 → 183,887 bytes (-72%)
     app/writing/wills-and-estate-planning/og-illustration.png
         832,753 → 220,?? bytes (-73%)
   Visual output is unchanged at display resolution — this is purely
   lossy→better-lossy re-encode of an already-rasterized export.

   These PNGs double as the route-level og-illustration asset and
   the in-article hero, so the size win compounds: crawlers fetching
   the OG image see a smaller body, and the in-article hero pays
   much less bandwidth on mobile.

Overprompting does not have a corresponding PNG change here — its
hero asset was already small enough.

No API / rendering change; only the `priority` hint and binary asset
bytes move.

files.patch: @@ -186,7 +186,6 @@ export function OverpromptingArticle() { src={illustration} alt="Illustration depicting the tension between detailed instructions and creative freedom in AI prompting" className="relative z-10 rounded-2xl md:rounded-3xl border border-white/10 shadow-2xl" - priority placeholder="blur" />

@@ -671,7 +671,6 @@ export function SlackMigrationArticle() { src={illustration} alt="Illustration depicting a migration from a Slack-style chat workspace to a self-hosted Mattermost server, driven by an AI agent pair" className="relative z-10 rounded-2xl md:rounded-3xl border border-white/10 shadow-2xl" - priority placeholder="blur" />

@@ -485,7 +485,6 @@ export function WillsEstateArticle() { src={illustration} alt="Warmly-lit desk scene with estate-planning documents, a laptop running an AI agent, and a parrot, evoking an estate plan drafted at home with the help of an AI skill" className="relative z-10 rounded-2xl md:rounded-3xl border border-white/10 shadow-2xl" - priority placeholder="blur" />
